list.name: Test Events
list.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "text"])

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "maxAT" or r._field == "meanAT" or r._field == "minAT")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 5.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg" or r._field == "pct50.0" or r._field == "pct90.0" or r._field == "pct95.0" or r._field == "pct99.0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "countError")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "countError")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "transaction"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: 📊 Transactions per Second (by sampler)
panels.description: Аналог jp@gc - Transactions per Second из JMeter. Показывает TPS каждого семплера (success зелёные, failure красные)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "ok")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value) / 5.0, _field: r.transaction + " (success)"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "success")

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "ko")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value) / 5.0, _field: r.transaction + " (failure)"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "failure")

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction != "all" and r.transaction != "internal")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.transaction}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "min" or r._field == "max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jmeter")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "jmeter")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rb" or r._field == "sb")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.transaction == "all")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.statut == "all")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 5.0}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
